creator: hulleyrob@gmail.com
text:
after updating bandwhich to latest version running the program gives the following output:

thread 'display_handler' panicked at 'called `Result::unwrap()` on an `Err` value: ParseIntError { kind: InvalidDigit }', src/os/lsof_utils.rs:114:40
        note: run with `RUST_BACKTRACE=1` environment variable to display a backtrace
